_doc: All campus, NL, and national mental health resources. Edit this file to update phone numbers, hours, or add resources — no code changes needed. Every entry MUST have an opaque id (snake_case, never human-readable names with phone numbers). The id is what gets stored in Supabase resource_clicks; it must not reveal anything identifying on its own. Resource tiers map to crisis severity: red (acute crisis), yellow (elevated distress), green (routine wellness).

resources.name: 988 Suicide Crisis Helpline
resources.description: Free, confidential support for people thinking about suicide or worried about a loved one. Call or text 988.

resources.name: NL Provincial Crisis Line
resources.description: Newfoundland and Labrador's 24/7 mental health crisis line.

resources.name: Good2Talk NL
resources.description: Free, confidential, 24/7 helpline for post-secondary students in Newfoundland and Labrador. Professional counsellors.

resources.name: 811 HealthLine
resources.description: Newfoundland and Labrador's provincial health information and mental health triage line.

resources.name: Crisis Text Line
resources.description: Text-based crisis support for young adults.

resources.name: Trans Lifeline
resources.description: Peer support for trans and gender-diverse individuals.

resources.name: Emergency Services
resources.description: If you or someone else is in immediate danger, call 911.

resources.name: MUN Campus Enforcement & Patrol
resources.description: 24/7 emergency response on the St. John's campus.

resources.name: Waterford Hospital — Psychiatric Emergency
resources.description: Psychiatric emergency services at the Waterford Hospital in St. John's.

resources.name: Health Sciences Centre Emergency
resources.description: Emergency department at the Health Sciences Centre, St. John's.

resources.name: MUN Student Wellness & Counselling Centre
resources.description: Free counselling and wellness services for MUN students. Same-day "Let's Talk" drop-in available during the academic year.

resources.name: Grenfell Student Wellness
resources.description: Counselling and wellness services for Grenfell Campus students.

resources.name: Togetherall
resources.description: Anonymous 24/7 peer support community, moderated by trained clinicians. Free for MUN students with an @mun.ca email.

resources.name: Bridge the gApp
resources.description: Newfoundland and Labrador's provincial self-help mental health platform. Free self-guided programs, coping tools, and local resources.

resources.name: MindShift CBT
resources.description: Free CBT-based mobile app from Anxiety Canada. Tools for anxiety, worry, and panic.
